name: Soilbuild Construction Group Ltd.
summary: Soilbuild Construction Group Ltd., an investment holding company, engages in the construction business in Singapore and Myanmar. It offers a range of real estate services, which include civil engineering, design and build, construction, turnkey construction, project management consultancy, procurement, and mechanical and electrical installation. The company also provides construction management services; and manufactures construction materials and parts, as well as operates as a building and general contractor. Its projects comprise residential and business space properties. The company was founded in 1976 and is based in Singapore.
